signal_title: Formal Proceedings Against X Under the Digital Services Act
risk_rationale: The formal proceedings against X under the DSA highlight potential inadequacies in content moderation and transparency, which are critical areas for TikTok's compliance in the EU market. This poses a material compliance gap that requires immediate attention to avoid similar scrutiny.

compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Enhanced transparency in content moderation practices as per DSA
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The proceedings suggest potential inadequacies in content moderation transparency, indicating that TikTok's current biannual reporting may not meet the enhanced transparency expectations under the DSA.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Ad library - Searchable political ads archive
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Enhanced transparency in advertising practices as per DSA
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The proceedings highlight insufficient transparency in advertising, suggesting that TikTok's current ad library may need to be expanded to meet DSA requirements.

remediations.title: Enhance Content Moderation Transparency
remediations.description: Implement additional transparency measures in content moderation practices to align with DSA requirements, including more frequent and detailed reporting.
acceptance_criteria: Implement quarterly content moderation transparency reports
Include detailed metrics on content takedowns and appeals

remediations.title: Expand Advertising Transparency
remediations.description: Enhance the ad library to include more comprehensive data on all types of ads, not just political, to meet DSA transparency requirements.
acceptance_criteria: Expand ad library to include all ad categories
Ensure real-time updates and public accessibility

business_impact: Failure to address these compliance gaps could result in significant regulatory scrutiny and potential fines under the DSA, impacting TikTok's operations and reputation in the EU market.
recommended_actions: Conduct a detailed audit of current content moderation and advertising transparency practices
Develop a roadmap for implementing enhanced transparency measures
Engage with EU regulators to ensure alignment with DSA expectations
